events.description:
A quiet escape in the heart of the city returns! 
The Morgan Garden reopens this Friday, May 1, and will be open with museum admission during public hours every Friday, Saturday, and Sunday through November 1, 2026.

Tucked in front of the historic library, the Garden offers one of New York’s most elegant greenspaces, where periwinkle beds line the loggia, bluestone pathways echo Renaissance floor
